# requirements.txt with hash verification
# Generated by: pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements.in
#
# To regenerate: pip-compile --generate-hashes requirements.in -o requirements.txt
# To install:    pip install --require-hashes --only-binary :all: -r requirements.txt
#
# The --hash= annotations ensure pip verifies each package before installing.
# If a package is tampered (even by a compromised CDN), the install fails.

requests==2.32.3 \
